caption: A blonde woman stands against a solid purple background, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" partially visible. She wears a thin, beige headset microphone that extends across her cheek. Across the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she communicates. In the first frame, she looks slightly to her left with a neutral expression. By the second frame, she is looking forward with a more focused gaze. In the third frame, she smiles slightly while continuing to speak. In the final frame, she appears mid-sentence with her mouth open and eyes squinted. Her posture remains relatively still, though her hand movements are partially visible at the bottom of the frame, suggesting she is gesturing as she speaks.
